x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces SCA's open capital-plan and procurement data (capital projects, upcoming contracts, RFP solicitations, prequalified vendors, enrollment/capacity, inspections) and adds apply_for_prequalification — the net-new vendor write workflow locked today inside the bidset SharePoint portal.

server.name: io.nyc.sca
server.title: NYC School Construction Authority (SCA)
server.description: Agent-native access to the NYC School Construction Authority — school-construction capital projects, upcoming CIP/CAP contracts, RFP solicitations, the prequalified/disqualified vendor roster, enrollment and capacity, and construction inspections from NYC Open Data, plus the net-new ability to apply to become a prequalified vendor — a workflow that today lives only in PDF forms and the bidset SharePoint portal.
server.instructions: Use find_capital_projects / get_capital_project to locate school-construction projects by borough, geographic (school) district, type, or status and drill into schedules, budgets, and capacity. find_upcoming_contracts and find_solicitations cover the forward procurement pipeline (CIP/CAP awards and current/anticipated RFPs) vendors watch. find_vendors searches the prequalified vendor roster (filter by trade code or M/WBE/local certifications, or disqualified=true for barred firms). find_enrollment_capacity returns the demand signal behind the capital plan; find_inspections covers field inspection requests and observations. apply_for_prequalification (net-new) submits a vendor prequalification application; it requires an authenticated firm and mutates state — confirm the firm name, request type, and trade code with the user before submitting. list_my_prequalifications tracks an authenticated firm's own applications.

tools.name: find_capital_projects
tools.title: Find Capital Projects
tools.description: Search SCA school-construction capital projects by borough, geographic (school) district, project type, status, and/or free text.

tools.name: get_capital_project
tools.title: Get Capital Project
tools.description: Fetch an SCA capital project (schedule, budget, capacity, geography) by Building ID.

tools.name: find_upcoming_contracts
tools.title: Find Upcoming Contracts
tools.description: List SCA upcoming contracts to be awarded (CIP and CAP pipelines) and change-order events, by program, borough, geographic district, or category.

tools.name: find_solicitations
tools.title: Find Solicitations
tools.description: List SCA RFP solicitations (current and anticipated) by stage, department, or free text.

tools.name: find_vendors
tools.title: Find Vendors
tools.description: Search the SCA prequalified vendor roster by trade code or M/WBE/local certification, or set disqualified=true to list firms currently barred from bidding.

tools.name: find_enrollment_capacity
tools.title: Find Enrollment & Capacity
tools.description: Search enrollment, capacity, and utilization records — the demand signal behind SCA's capital plan — by geographic district, building, or organization.

tools.name: find_inspections
tools.title: Find Inspections
tools.description: Search SCA construction inspection requests and observations by school code, borough, category, or date range.

tools.name: list_my_prequalifications
tools.title: List My Prequalifications
tools.description: List the authenticated firm's own vendor prequalification applications and their status — today trackable only inside the bidset SharePoint portal.

tools.name: apply_for_prequalification
tools.title: Apply for Prequalification
tools.description: Submit an SCA vendor prequalification application (become a prequalified firm). NET-NEW workflow with no public API today — it lives only as PDF forms and the bidset SharePoint portal. Requires an authenticated firm. Mutates state — confirm firm name, request type, and trade code first.
